scripts.db:up: docker compose -f infrastructure/docker/docker-compose.yml up -d postgres redis
scripts.db:down: docker compose -f infrastructure/docker/docker-compose.yml stop postgres redis
scripts.db:logs: docker compose -f infrastructure/docker/docker-compose.yml logs -f postgres redis
scripts.db:reset: docker compose -f infrastructure/docker/docker-compose.yml down -v && docker compose -f infrastructure/docker/docker-compose.yml up -d postgres redis
scripts.db:psql: docker compose -f infrastructure/docker/docker-compose.yml exec postgres psql -U postgres -d ptas168_dev
